ddls:
CREATE TABLE "financial_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metric entry */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the recorded metrics */,
  "financial_instrument_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the financial instrument */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the data source */,
  "metric_type" TEXT /* Type of metric (e.g., daily, weekly, monthly) */,
  "erus" REAL /* Performance metric for ERUS financial instrument */,
  "fcom" REAL /* Performance metric for FCOM financial instrument */,
  "fone" REAL /* Performance metric for FONE financial instrument */,
  "ixp" REAL /* Performance metric for IXP financial instrument */,
  "iyz" REAL /* Performance metric for IYZ financial instrument */,
  "ltl" REAL /* Performance metric for LTL financial instrument */,
  "vox" REAL /* Performance metric for VOX financial instrument */,
  "xtl" REAL /* Performance metric for XTL financial instrument */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "financial_instruments" (
  "instrument_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each financial instrument */,
  "instrument_name" TEXT /* Name of the financial instrument */,
  "instrument_type" TEXT /* Type of financial instrument (e.g., stock, bond, derivative) */,
  "isin" TEXT /* International Securities Identification Number */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency in which the instrument is traded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("instrument_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the data source */,
  "source_type" TEXT /* Type of data source (e.g., API, CSV, database) */,
  "data_provider" TEXT /* Provider of the data source */,
  "last_synced_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last synchronization */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., analyst, manager, auditor) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the user role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the user role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_role_assignments" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user role */,
  "assigned_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the role was assigned */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id", "role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "report_name" TEXT /* Name of the report */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the report */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User who created the report */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the report was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the report was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "report_metrics" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the report */,
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the metric */,
  "metric_type" TEXT /* Type of metric (e.g., daily, weekly, monthly) */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the metric range */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the metric range */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the metric was added to the report */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id", "metric_id")
)
